data_description.name: A name for this solar array (e.g. "Roof South", "Garage East")

user.description: Give your solar array a name. Everything else can be configured after setup.

data_description.azimuth: The compass direction your panels face. 0 = North, 90 = East, 180 = South, 270 = West

azimuth_manual.description: Enter a fixed azimuth for your panels. Use this if your panels do not move.

data_description.azimuth_sensor: A sensor that reports a value between 0 and 360 degrees. The integration will read this in real time

azimuth_sensor.description: Select a sensor that provides the current azimuth of your panels. Use this for solar trackers or adjustable mounts.

data_description.declination: The tilt angle of your panels. 0 = completely flat (horizontal), 90 = completely upright (vertical)

declination_manual.description: Enter a fixed declination for your panels. Use this if your panels do not move.

data_description.declination_sensor: A sensor that reports a value between 0 and 90 degrees. The integration will read this in real time

declination_sensor.description: Select a sensor that provides the current tilt angle of your panels. Use this for solar trackers or adjustable mounts.

data.damping_evening: Damping factor: adjusts the results in the evening
data.damping_morning: Damping factor: adjusts the results in the morning

data_description.api_key: Optional. Provide an API key to unlock higher rate limits from Forecast.Solar
data_description.azimuth_choice: Choose whether to enter a fixed compass direction for your panels, or read it from a sensor in real time
data_description.damping_evening: Scales down the forecast toward the end of the day. 0 = no adjustment, higher values reduce the evening estimate
data_description.damping_morning: Scales down the forecast at the start of the day. 0 = no adjustment, higher values reduce the morning estimate
data_description.declination_choice: Choose whether to enter a fixed tilt angle for your panels, or read it from a sensor in real time
data_description.inverter_size: The maximum output of your inverter in Watts. Forecast results will be capped at this value
data_description.location_choice: Use your Home Assistant home location, or enter coordinates manually
data_description.wattage: The combined Watt peak (Wp) rating of all solar modules in this array

init.description: Configure your solar array. Changes here take effect immediately — no need to remove and re-add the integration.

location_manual.description: Enter the precise coordinates of your solar panels. This is useful if your panels are not at your home address.
